form.formComment: Backs up three days after he failed to impress 6th (Sr2) over 1800m at this track, beaten 35 m by Letsstartinheaven (2:09.80) in NR 56 to 64 on April 11 at $81. Before that 7th (Sr2) over 1800m at this track, at the bell was 7th-12 beaten 17 m by Deuce Coupe (2:10.10) in NR 50 to 59 on April 4 at $13.90. The ace draw could spark improvement.

form.formComment: Last start game effort when 2nd (Sr4) over 1800m at this track beaten 9 m by Signature Look (2:11.10) in NR 48 to 55 on April 11 at $11. Two runs back posted a big 8 m win as favourite when quickly away, (Fr3) at this track (2:10.10) beating Vatican Green in NR 50 to 59 on April 4 at $2.60 at the bell was leading 3.4. Drawn to advantage and can go close.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 8th (Fr5) over 1800m at this track, beaten 10 m by Spirit Of Anarchy (2:13.70) in NR 65 to 79 on April 11 at $61. form.formComment: Capable of better than we have seen lately. Backing up quickly after was driven from back in the field when 9th (Fr3) over 1800m after showing early pace at this track, beaten 11 m by Spirit Of Anarchy (2:13.70) in NR 65 to 79 on April 11 at $21. The run previous was well back in the run when 6th (Fr4) over 1800m after showing early pace at this track, at the bell was 7th-11.6 beaten 13 m by All Da Rage (2:11.00) in No NR on April 4 at $8.30. Better than last start and can improve sharply.
